faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement team at our Tech Mahindra Smart Academy for Healthcare provides the best service and supports the students at every point. Top recruiting companies like NephroPlus provide placements, and around 90% of students get internships. The lowest package is 2 Lacs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi are not offered to students; it's only for faculty members. The labs in our academy are very neat and clean, and every piece of equipment for practicals is available. Hostel facilities are also very good, with nice food and clean rooms. The environment at the hostel is safe.

college_info.intro:
PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management offers BTech and MBA as its flagship programmes. BTech at the college is offered for the duration of 4 years at the UG level. The specialisations include Electrical Engineering, Telecommunication Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, among others.
Apart from this, MBA is provided at the PG level for the duration of 2 years. Admission to the MBA course is based on entrance exams such as MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT, ATMA, and MAH CET. The minimum eligibility is to pass graduation with 50% aggregate marks from a recognised board. Candidates can take a detailed below at the PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management popular programmes:

UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    To get admission to PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management, candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the college. Candidates are required to qualify for any national-level entrance exam, among JEE Main or MHT CET.

review_content.Placements: In our college, there are very good placements and reputable companies visiting our college. The placement process is held with the help of the placement office. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, etc., participate. The highest package a student secured in college is 16 LPA. The company names are Capgemini, Hexaware, Amazon, Dell, HP, GlobalLogic, TCS, Infosys, etc. The list is never-ending. content.Placements: The placement is also good. The chance of getting placed is really very high. Every major recruiter comes, and many big IT companies like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Practo, etc., visit the campus for recruitment. The average package is 6 LPA, whereas the highest package is 10 LPA. Almost 80% of students get placed from the campus. There are good internships. Big companies like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, Byju's, and Google offer internships. They provide us with many internships and help students nourish their talent, getting them ready for a bright future so they can get good placements.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: In our college, there are very good placements and reputable companies visiting our college. The placement process is held with the help of the placement office. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, etc., participate. The highest package a student secured in college is 16 LPA. Good internships are available at companies like HCL, Amazon, Dell, Facebook, and many from abroad came to the university for student selection. On average, packages range from 4 LPA to the highest at 18 LPA. If we study, we can secure good placements as desired, and there are multiple rounds of interviews.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.

content.Placements: The placement cell of the college is very active, and they call the students for campus placements from the 4th semester. Almost 80% of students get placed on the campus. The college also trained us properly before the placement. Many big IT companies visit the campus for recruitment. The company names are Capgemini, Hexaware, Amazon, Dell, HP, GlobalLogic, TCS, Infosys, etc. The list is never-ending. At the time of the final year, the institute takes a lot of helpful steps for the betterment of students. The average package is 6 LPA, whereas the highest package is 10 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My review about this college.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent, with many well known and respected companies visiting. The highest package offered was about 18 LPA. The average package is around 5 to 6 LPA and it depends on a student skills. Various companies visit for different specializations. For systems, software companies like TCS and Infosys recruit. For operations companies such as JBL and Maersk visit. For finance, J.P. Morgan, CUB, South Indian Bank and ICICI are some of the companies. For marketing Red Bull and many others visit. There are also great internships available with large companies like Amazon, Byjus and Google.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get admission in PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management without JEE Main score. JEE Main is one of the accepting exams required for admission to BTech course. However, aspirants can also get admission in BTech based on their score in MHT CET. It is a state-level entrance test conducted once in a year in online mode. Hence, it is not mandatory to pass JEE Main for admission.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management considers entrance exam scores for admission. Aspirants with a valid score in any of the accepted national or state-level entrance exams are offered seat. Below is the course-wise accepted entrance exams for PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management admissions:CourseAccepted Entrance ExamsBTechMHT CET/ JEE MainMTechGATE/ MHT CET MTechMBAMAT/ XAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ ATMA/ MAH CETMCAMAH MCA CETPhDPET/ UGC-NET/ CSIR NET/ SLET/ GATE/ GPAT

faqs.question: How can I get admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management is based on entrance-exam scores. The college accepts national, state and university-level entrance tests for admission. Aspirants must pass MHT CET or JEE Main for BTech, GATE or MHT CET M.Tech for M.Tech and MAH MCA CET for MCA programmes. Besides, candidates can appear for PET conducted by the university for PhD programmes or provide a valid score in UGC-NET, CSIR-NET, SLET, GATE, etc. for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: PR Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management offers admission to courses based on entrance exam scores. Candidates have to first apply for preferred entrance exam and then appear for the same. The college accepts entrance exams such as MHT CET, MAH MBA CET, MAH MCA CET, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Hence, there is no direct admission and candidates need to participate in each selection round for a seat in the college.

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were good on an average better than any other college's hostel. The food facilities offered were too good and changed every week. There were 2 shared rooms and also separate rooms available. There was a good and healthy environment.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is also of very good quality. The rooms in our college hostel are nice, and each room has 3 students. The food in the hostel is also of very good quality, and the students can live very comfortably.

reviews.review_heading: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The course curriculum was designed to help us understand the real market requirements for companies. We were provided with real case studies to solve in our classes. The faculty members are experienced and very knowledgeable. They focus on both theory and practical learning, allowing students to grasp concepts through hands-on experience. Hostels are awesome, with limited restrictions. North Indian and South Indian menus are available, and students can choose based on their preferences. Non-veg ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of P. R. Pote Patil College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: The course is very useful as new technologies are emerging. Everything nowadays is getting digital, so this course is also evolving with many new changes. The teaching staff is very supportive and always encourages the students to come up with new project ideas, and also gives good support to those ideas and new projects. Guide us in many ways and efficiently in computer programming languages like C, C++, Java, HTML, etc. The computer lab is good for understanding those things by yourself. The h...

reviews.review_heading: My review about this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good and the room accommodation is awesome. When it comes to the food, there is a slight drawback. But, there are canteens where we can pay and eat so we don't bother about the hostel food. In the canteen, we get good food until 12 a.m., which helped us during exam times when we went to the canteen to relax at night.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in batch 2025. Nearly 600+ students are placed and best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has best infrastructure. There is a special stuff in college that maintains the college cleanliness. Best college I have ever seen. The exam conducted at the college is maintained by the college discipline. I would like to suggest this college to everyone. All labs are digital, and Wi-Fi is also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MBA college: placements, teaching, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The institute has a well-developed infrastructure for the MBA program. It provides all essential facilities such as labs, a library, a canteen, sports equipment, and Wi-Fi. The quality of facilities is satisfactory, and the food served in the canteen is affordable and decent. A hostel facility is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory experience and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In the department area, there is a library. Both online and offline data resources are available. Our classrooms and computer labs are quite updated and have Wi-Fi all over. The hostel is also clean and quite well-maintained. Other facilities include a mess, sports ground, recreational areas, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the experience is satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in the department area is quite good. Facilities include a computer laboratory and Wi-Fi. Classrooms have modern and visual aids. The library is good. The hostel provides comfortable rooms. We have mess facilities and recreational areas.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides infrastructure support like classrooms, computer labs, networking labs, Wi-Fi access though limited at times, and a library. The hostel accommodation with have rooms, a mess, and medical facilities. The Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel as well.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with quite reasonable fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure. Surroundings are taken care of. The department area has necessities like good classrooms with smart boards, a very big library, and a Wi-Fi connection. The living space for hostel accommodation provided is good. The mess food is not that bad average in taste.

reviews.review_heading: College provides best faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are supportive. The facilities that are provided by the college are good and help students to live. The classrooms are very good, and the labs and library that are in the college are peaceful. Students can easily learn many things.

reviews.review_heading: College is really good for students coming from rural areas or a moderate background.
reviews.review_text: There is a library not very large or small and there is a specific library for every department. There are labs available. There is no boy's hostel offered by college. The canteen has average food but medical college is in camps so good medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of 2024 in Amravati, better placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and I like it. There is no hostel available, but the course they provide is very nice. The Wi-Fi speed and computers are very decent, and I think the classrooms are slightly better than other colleges. The infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Well-dignified faculty, neat and clean campus, well-disciplined.
reviews.review_text: Hi-tech labs. Compulsory lectures. Library. Wi-Fi. Computer labs typically have computers with internet access, printers, scanners, and other peripherals. Campus quality of facility is little bit good. Canteen is better. Food: Canteens offer a variety of food options to meet the needs and preferences of students, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options. Social interaction: Canteens are a place for students to exchange ideas, socialize, and engage in intellectual discussions. Conveni...

faqs.answer: A:    Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit (SSUS) accepts entrance exam scores for admission to MA programs. The university also conducts aptitude and practical tests for some programs. For the academic year 2023-2024, the university conducted the entrance exam in April or May. The following programs were available: MA MuseologyMA Comparative Literature and LinguisticsMA Dance (Bharathanatyam)MA Sanskrit GeneralOther programs include: M.Sc, M.S.W, MFA, MPES, PG Diploma. Admission to the 2-year Master of Fine Arts Degree Program requires the following: A Bachelor Degree in Fine Arts from a university recognised by SSUSA minimum of 55% marks in aggregateAdmission to PG programs is not available to students who are already enrolled in another PG programme at the university
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit accept for admission to MA?

faqs.answer: A:    The latest cutoff for MA at Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit: First year to final year B.A. Sanskrit students: 50% marksMinimum marks in qualifying examinations: 60%Master of Fine Arts Degree Programme: 55% marks in aggregateEligibility: 10+2, Bachelor's Degree, Bachelor's Degree with 55%The college conducts an entrance exam to select candidates. To be eligible for the MA in Sanskrit course at Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit, you must: Have a bachelor's degree in any stream from a recognised university in IndiaHave a minimum of 50-55% in BA Sanskrit or any equivalent higher degreeQualify for entrance exams such as CUET-PG, DSVEE, etc.The MA in Sanskrit course is two years long.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

placement_data.title: Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2023 stood at INR 1.8 LPA and INR 2 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.6 LPA and INR 2.4 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit UG 3-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 1.80 LPA and INR 2.50 LPA , respectively. Apart from this, a total of 120 students were placed out of 813 students during Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit PG 2-year placements 2022.

faqs.question: What are the career options after pursuing BA from SSUS?
faqs.answer: After pursuing BA from Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit, a big number of job opportunities are accessible for graduates in this field as they can be an educator, interpreter or a consultant. Outsourcing, consulting and freelancing is the new pattern in the field of Sanskrit language career. In the academic domain, numerous career options available after a BA at SSUS , such as higher education in MA, MBA etc. To read more about the scope of a BA degree, candidates can read: BA course career scope

faqs.question: Does St Teresa's College offer better placements than Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit?
faqs.answer: First of all St Teresa's College which is autonomous institute present in Ernakulum, Kerala offers 23 UG and 11 PG programs and provides admission to girls students only. On the other hand, Sree Sankaracharya University of Sanskrit which is a public institute located in Kerala itself aims at providing Sanskrit and Indology studies. According to NIRF report of 2022 the median packages of both the universities are as follows:- The median package for UG 3-year course in SSUK was INR 1.80 LPA whereas it was INR 2.04 LPA in STC. The median package for UG 4-year for SSUK was INR 3.00 LPA whereas in STC it was around INR 2.10 lpa. The median package for PG 1-year in SSUK was INR 3.50 LPA whereas it was INR 2.16 lpa.

However, for the year 2021, it was INR 1.60 LPA. A total of 12 students were placed during the placement process. description: Best Dental Science College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Best Dental Science College NEET UG cutoff 2024 has been announced for admission to the BDS course. The institute offers admission to the Bachelor of Dental Surgery(BDS) course based on candidates’ performance in the NEET UG exam. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling rounds for final admission. During the Best Dental Science College 2024 cut off, the last round closing rank for BDS admission was 565. For more information, refer to the table below:

As per the Best Dental Science College BDS cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank was 565 for the General HS category students. The cutoff for the same course was 12198 in 2023 and 12684 in 2022 for admission. So, analysing the cutoff trends over three years, BDS saw a drop in its last-round closing ranks for the students belonging to the General HS category.

Best Dental Science College accepts NEET UG scores for admission to the BDS course. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the important NEET UG dates for admission to Best Dental Science College.

Best Dental Science College BDS Cutoff 2024 has been released for Round 1. The cutoff was released category-wise for candidates belonging to different categories under the HS quota. In 2024, for the General HS category candidates, the cutoff rank during Round 1 was closed at 7351. For the OBC HS category candidates, the cutoff was closed at 16523.

Best Dental Science College Cutoff 2024 has been released for its second round based on candidates' performance in the Tamil Nadu NEET PG exam. The Round 2 cutoff for admission to the MDS was ranged between 51 and 273, for the General AI quota.

Candidates can find the Round 2 Cutoff for this year along with the last-round cutoff for the previous 2 years to have an overall idea of the Cutoff trends. However, more details such as round and category-wise cutoff can be viewed using the filter provide

The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for RBVRR Women's College of Pharmacy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 100 students were admitted at RBVRR Women's College of Pharmacy and 73 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 73 students 20 were placed with median salary of INR 150000 and 45 students opted for higher studies. A total of 100 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at RBVRR Women's College of Pharmacyand 81 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 81 students 45 were placed with median salary of INR 150000 and 30 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 25 students were admitted at RBVRR Women's College of Pharmacy and 22 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 22 students 22 were placed with median salary of INR 220000. A total of 16 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at RBVRR Women's College of Pharmacyand 14 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 14 students 14 were placed with median salary of INR 220000.

reviews_list.review_title: Aditya College of Pharmacy’s review.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 120 students join our college every years. The highest package of our college is 4 lacs per annum. Top companies like Cipla and Aurobindo visit to hire our students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are well-equipped having various chemicals available. The classrooms are very neat and clean with proper facilities for the students. The Library consists of various books. Sports are available with limited facilities.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very good in teaching and are also very experienced. Their teaching quality is very good, they stick mainly to the text books and teach in both manual and virtual ways. The students are taken to the industry in their last year to gain practical knowledge.

content.Infrastructure: The Infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Labs are well-equipped having various chemicals available. The classrooms are very neat and clean with proper facilities for the students. The Library consists of various books. Sports are available with limited facilities.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very good in teaching and are also very experienced. Their teaching quality is very good, they stick mainly to the text books and teach in both manual and virtual ways. The students are taken to the industry in their last year to gain practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Aditya College Of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Each year, 120 students join our course. The highest salary package offered for our course is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Cipla and Aurobindo. They select our students for their companies. Almost 90% of students got jobs in various MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides well-maintained facilities like fans and water. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. Classrooms are good. The hostel food is not good. Only a few sports facilities are available. Games periods are limited. Medical facilities are available in our college.

content.Placements: 1. 120 members are placed into our college every year. 2. The highest package nearly comes to 4 lakhs per annum. 3. Roles like production department are offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Labs are well-equipped with various chemicals. 2. No Wi-Fi connection is there for our college. 3. Classrooms are well equipped with the basic requirements. 4. The library is very good, with all the books needed for our course and also for competitive exams.

The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.answer:
Aditya College Of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.PharmaCandidate must have passsed B.Pharma. and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.Pharm.DCandidate who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in pharmacy course conducted by the Andhra Pradesh / Telangana State Board of Technical Education and Training or any other examination recognised as equivalent can also apply.
Candidates should have completed 17 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).B.PharmaCandidates should have completed 16 years of age by the date of commencement of admission or on such other date as may be notified by the CET committee. There is no upper age limit.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, facilities and peaceful environment.
reviews.review_text: The hostel at Aditya University is amazing. It provides every facility you want, like a peaceful garden, many trees, hot water, good electricity, water management, spacious rooms and corridors with separate beds, and the food provided is good. Milk and tea are provided every morning and night and the food tastes good.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest for every student to study pharmacy in Aditya college for a good future.
reviews.review_text: Aditya College has a good infrastructure and very good, neat and clean hostels that provide all facilities, including Wi-Fi. Classrooms with digital projectors and good labs provide all the facilities for students. Hostels provide better food and they take responsibility for every student.

reviews.review_heading: Aditya College of Pharmacy review.
reviews.review_text: As a college student, my college provides good infrastructure and facilities in terms of both academics and hostels. While there is room for improvement in terms of mess food quality and transport, along with some personal development programs,

reviews.review_heading: It is better in study to improve the knowledge but the placements are less in option.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure facility and there is good college Premises. There is a Wi-Fi, library, and Labs which are used for all subject experimental practices in course of college. Good hostel facility such as hostel premises but the food not at all good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college faculty, good placements every year, and a greener environment.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure has labs, classrooms, restrooms, a library, smart class, Wi-Fi, computer labs, ground for games, a green environment, sick rooms, a hospital, food mess, and canteens all the above are available in our college. All the facilities are good in my college. Several competitions were done on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Our college has libraries and Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good. The hostel rooms are clean. The hostel workers are good. They have better interaction with the students. The food served in the hostel is average. They conduct sports and games activities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but the hostel food is not good.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are well-equipped. We have a digital library. It is a good college. The hostel is not good. The quality of the food is not good. The hostel fee is Rs. 100000 per year. Digital classrooms are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is best for placements and studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good and nice infrastructure is available. There is a library with many records and equipment. The labs are very clean and the reagents and chemicals used in the labs are of very good quality. Hostel facility is not bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges for Ayurveda enthusiastic.

review_content.Placements: Our college contains 50 students per batch. Almost 100% of the students receive internships at Civil Hospital, Satara. It also provides Ayurveda as well as modern diagnosis treatment. There is the availability of MD Kayachikitsa for post-graduation. It provides every student with an equal chance to attend to patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every department requires a specific lab, like pathology lab, anatomy dissection hall, physiology lab and ENT lab. The surgery department also has an operation theatre where surgeries are done. The library also has all the required books and Samhitas to read and refer to. Hostels are separate for boys and girls. The canteen provides morning breakfast, lunch and dinner for all students and staff members. Classrooms are precious, airy and well-maintained.

In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides a very peaceful campus life.

review_content.Placements: You can get a job in any private clinic, and you can also start your own business. As in dentistry, there will be no campus interview at all, but it will be easy for you to open your clinic as soon as you finish your course. You can also apply for government postings.
review_content.Infrastructure: The only drawback is the hostel and food. The infrastructure of the college is good. The campus gives you a peaceful mindset to study. There are separate lecture rooms and practical labs. The lecture rooms are air-conditioned. It also got a private canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is strict and has a fair management.

review_content.Placements: At dental schools, there are no options offered, like placements. Students after internship will work under any dental surgeons clinical or a start-up with their own clinic, or any reputed clinic consultations. Salary packages offered are based on our service and skilful work.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is comparatively too good along with better lab facilities, library and comfortable air-conditioned classrooms. The canteen serves the best food at affordable prices. Apart from studies, college is also good at sports events and conference programs.

highlights.summary: The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for Pharmacy College Azamgarh admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for B.Pharma, and it also has other courses like BDS, GNM B.Sc. and nursing.

review_content.Placements: Around 60-70% of students got placed. The lowest salary offered was Rs 15,000 per month, and the highest salary offered was Rs 35,000 per month. The top recruiting companies were Cipla and others. Almost 70% of students got internships. Students have to go for practice in the 3rd year for job offers, companies, and industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are good. A library is available from where you can issue books. There is no canteen in the college. There are no games facilities. Hostel facilities are available in our college. There are no sports available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Its not best but not bad.

review_content.Placements: Im 2017 batch from branch Diploma in Pharmacy. It is 2 year Diploma course. Many of senior students from this college working as a pharmacist in government as well as pvt hospital. Government offered 15-20k at samvida and permanent at 45+ thousands rupees. Pvt hospital hospital offers 7k to 20k according to experience. Almost 100% Students get compulsory internship in government hospital/district hospital/medical college/ etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Student get Wi-Fi surfing. Classroom is not much furnished. There is a huge library but its close due to unavailability of staff librarian. The food is very good. The warden of the hostel (KP singh presently) takes inspection of food very frequently. There is an organisation of sports and games every year. Top games are volleyball, race, arrow throw, long jump, high jump etc.

reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. Labs and classrooms are good. A library is available from where you can issue books. There is no canteen in the college. There are no games facilities. Hostel facilities are available in our college. There are no sports available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Its not best but not bad.
reviews.review_text: Student get Wi-Fi surfing. Classroom is not much furnished. There is a huge library but its close due to unavailability of staff librarian. The food is very good. The warden of the hostel (KP singh presently) takes inspection of food very frequently. There is an organisation of sports and games every year. Top games are volleyball, race, arrow throw, long jump, high jump etc.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for ANA Group of Institutions admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the ANA Group of Institutions:

table.details: AKTU, BTE, MJPRU, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University, State Medical Faculty

college_info.intro:
ANA Group of Institutions popular courses are BSc and MBA. The institute offers BSc in Nursing. The course focuses on providing detailed nursing knowledge to medical aspirants and open opportunities in the healthcare sector. BSc Nursing students can work as Case Manager, Nurse Anesthetist, Certified Nurse Midwife, and other­s.
ANA Group of Institutions is one of the prestigious institutes. The institute offers an MBA which focuses on providing fundamental management knowledge. Students get core knowledge in fields such as Finance, HR, Marketing, and Accounting. After pursuing an MBA, students can get job opportunities such as HR Manager, Financial Advisor, Operation Manager, etc. Tabulated below are the details of the ANA Group of Institutions course, eligibility, and fees:

placements.overview: ANA Group of Institutions has a proper placement cell which helps the students to attain good job opportunities. The university offers comprehensive training in soft skills, teamwork and ethics through workshops and lectures by eminent people. As per the latest statistics on the official website, more than 55+ companies visited the campus. The highest package offered is INR 16+ LPA for Management and INR 12+ LPA for Engineering. ANA Group of Institutions' top recruiters are Google, Wipro, Ford, IBM, HCL, Airtel, and others. Tabulated below are the statistics of ANA Group of Institutions placements:

faqs.answer: A:    The career prospects after completing an MBA from ANA Group of Institutions prepare the students with fundamental management knowledge. Students get a holistic view of business core areas like Marketing, Finance, Accounting and HR. The average salary offered is INR 4 LPA – INR 8 LPA. The MBA degree holders are eligible to work in various sectors. Some of the popular job roles are HR Manager, Finance Manager, Management Analyst, Operation Manager, and others.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of ANA Group of Institutions.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students got placed in top companies. The packages are different for different students. 4.5 LPA is the highest package offered, and 1.5 LPA is the lowest package offered. Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, TCS, etc., come here. 65% of students got internships in Tech Mahindra and Infosys. HR, mechanical engineer, project manager, and sales executive roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are above average. Semi Wi-Fi zone is available on campus. Digital classrooms, 5 labs and 3 libraries are available. The hostel is okay, and the food is very good in both places. Medical facilities are good. Sports events are arranged every month.

review_summary.college_name: ANA Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average college for activities.

content.Placements: There are 11 students in my batch. College doesn't provide placements. There are only seven students in the Computer Science branch of Bachelor of Technology. There is one student in the Mechanical branch of Bachelor of Technology. Only two branches are completed in the 4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty, sports, and games are nil. No sports events during my study time. No faculty members from other branches teach students in the Bachelor of Technology. No practicals, no discussion sessions—only in college, teachers get students to write notes of the syllabus.

individual_reviews.title: The worst college ever I have seen in my life.

content.Placements: About placement. There is no placement at all, only very low level companies came here for recruitment. And the package is also very low. Placement is only for name sake. They fool students by telling that there is awesome placement but after admission they ignored students like garbage. Facilities are only for name.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not so good but okay. There is no Wi-Fi for students. And they do not allow students to play and eat in canteen in free time. If they found you outside the class, then they fine you. And hostel is terrible. Food is okay but not nutritious.

admission_overview.title: ANA Group of Institutions Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: ANA Group of Institutions admission is primarily entrance-based; however, merit-based admissions may also be offered at the institute's discretion. Students are offered several programmes at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Commerce, Science, Pharmacy, and more. ANA Group of Institutions offers courses, such as BAMS, BSc, BTech, MBA, and more. The institute is affiliated with the AKTU, BTE, MJPRU, Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University and State Medical Faculty. The institute's application process commences offline; however, online applications are also considered. Interested students can read the following article to learn more about the institute's admission criteria, process, and other relevant information about the offered programmes.

eligibility_selection.title: ANA Group of Institutions Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: ANA Group of Institutions course admission is made on the basis of preset admission criteria. Students seeking to join the institute need to meet both the basic eligibility requirements in addition to clearing the selection rounds, depending on the programme. The institute mainly accepts students on an entrance basis; however, merit in the last qualifying exam may also be taken into consideration for selective cases. The courses are offered in full-time mode and the duration ranges between two to 4.5 years depending on the programme. The institute accepts both national and state-level entrance test scores. Alternatively, management quota can also be availed by eligible students. Aspirants can check out the table below to learn all about the general admission criteria for some of the popular ANA Group of Institutions courses:

admission_process.title: ANA Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: The admission procedure for ANA Group of Institutions includes multiple steps, such as application, selection, and seat confirmation. Eligible students can then proceed accordingly with the rest of the steps. Students need to register themselves and go through the selection rounds to get a seat at the institute. Find below the steps to complete the ANA Group of Institutions admission process:
Step 1: Appear for the Accepted Entrance Exam

Since admissions are offered on an entrance basis, students must provide a valid score card of the accepted tests. For that, candidates need to appear for the accepted test mentioned above in the table.
Step 2: Apply Online

Students can visit the official website of the institute and start the application procedure by registering themselves and providing the specified information, such as personal details, educational qualifications, contact information, etc.
Step 3: Selection

The institute shortlists candidates on an entrance basis. The final selection is made based on the entrance exam score, followed by an institute-level interview. The interview is a rigorous process conducted to asses candidate's aptitude, leadership skills, etc. Detailed admission criteria can be obtained by visiting the official website of the institute.
Step 4: Seat Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, selected students need to pay the ANA Group of Institutions fees to secure their spots at the institute.

Here is a quick summary of the key highlights for the ANA Group of Institutions BE/BTech programme, including its eligibility, fees and dates:

faqs.question: Does ANA Group of Institutions offer management quota seats for BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, ANA Group of Institutions does offer management quota seats for the BTech course. To get the management quota seats. the institute follows certain rules and regulations according to the institute/ affiliated university norms. Moreover, the number of seats assigned or percentage is not mentioned on the official website of the institute.

faqs.question: What is the fee structure for BTech course at ANA Group of Institution?
faqs.answer: The total fees for the BTech course at ANA Group of Institutions include multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, examination fees, etc. As per the official sources, at the time of admission confirmation, candidates are obliged to pay 50% of the tuition fee; the rest can be paid till Nov. 30, 2025. Check out the fee components and their amounts below:Fee componentsAmount (for 3-4 years)TuitionINR 1.73 lakh–INR 2.6  lakhHostelINR 2.4 lakh–INR 3.2 lakhOne-time PaymentINR 1,000Total

faqs.question: When can I apply for BTech course at ANA Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For the academic batch 2025, BTech aspirants can fill out the enquiry form at ANA Group of Institutions for the academic batch 2025. The college opens its admission portal for new applicants; candidates who meet the eligibility criteria according to the BTech course can apply for the course.Candidates are required to submit the details about results from Class 12 and the mentioned entrance exam in the application form. Moreover, candidates can get admission through management quota also.

faqs.question: What entrance examination scores does ANA Group of Institutions accept for admission to BTech course?
faqs.answer: The institute offers a four-year BTech course at the undergraduate level. In addition, the ANA Group of Institutions accepts relevant scores from CUET UG/JEE Mains for admissions to the BTech course. The institute offers five specialisations in the BTech course and the eligibility criteria and selection process are similar for all offered specialisations.

faqs.question: Is the admission to MBA at ANA Group of Institution merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: ANA Group of Institutions MBA admissionis both merit- and entrance-based. For entrance-based admission, the institute accepts valid CUET PG scores. Moreover, for merit-based admission, the institute releases the merit on the basis of candidates' last qualifying examination. Before applying for the course, candidates must ensure that they complete the basic eligibility criteria that state applicants must complete their graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category).

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech course at ANA Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: ANA Group of Institutions offers five specialisations in the BTech course, namely, Computer Science Engineering with Data Science & AI,Civil Engineering,  Electronics and Communication Engineering,Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The total number of seats offered in these specialisation is 300. To get a seat in the BTech course, candidates are required to complete the basic eligibility criteria first, which state applicants must complete their Class 12 from the PCM stream with an aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved categories).

faqs.question: Where can I check JEE Main 2026 exam date?
faqs.answer: Candidates can check the JEE Main 2026 exam date allotted to them on their city intimation slip and JEE Main admit card. Candidates have to download the city intimation slip and admit card from the official website as per the schedule

faqs.question: When can I apply for MBA course at ANA Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: For the academic batch 2025, MBA aspirants can fill out the enquiry form at ANA Group of Institutions for the academic batch 2025. The college opens its admission portal for new applicants; candidates can fill out the form with the clicking option of 'waiting for results' (if applicable). Once candidates receive their results from graduation and the mentioned entrance exam, candidates can fill out and complete the application form accordingly. Moreover, candidates can get admission through management quota also.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Government medical college jalaun for Nursing .

review_content.Placements: The good thing about this college is that there is an attached hospital with it, which helps students with clinical practice and research without any travel time waste. There is a very low chance of selection because of the cutoffs and rank of this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities of this college are very awesome. The lablibrary, and lecture hall facilities are very fine. Hostel facilities include electricity, Wi-Fi, a hostel mess, a sports field, and a gymnasium court. There are multiple sports events organized every year for different batches.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: There should be an improvement in the maintenance of the infrastructure and facilities provided.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100 students are placed from each batch. The salary offered during an internship is approximately Rs. 7,000 per month. After the internship, students can do junior residentship or prepare for PG. All the students get an internship after they pass 4th year. The salary offered for junior resident doctors is Rs. 85,000 per month, and for a senior resident doctor, the salary offered is 1.15 lac per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a library, air-conditioned lecture theatres, demonstration rooms, teacher's office in all the departments, museums and lab rooms in all departments. Facilities in the hostel are average, but the quality of food is good. Medical facilities are already available because it is a medical college. We have a hospital to which the college is attached. There is an auditorium.

description: Government Medical College, Jalaun cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Jalaun NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26970 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Jalaun MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26970 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16785 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Jalaun accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 9654 to 54990, with MD in Paediatrics being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Government Medical College, Jalaun accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Paediatrics, with a round 3 closing rank of 9654 for the General AI category. In contrast, the cutoff for the OBC AI category for the same specialisation was 11399.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College, Jalaun cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1, wherein the closing rank for MBBS admission is 15909 among the General HS category students. The cutoff has been released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the HS quota.

Among the OBC category candidates, the UP NEET UG Round 1 cutoff stood at 17794 for MBBS under the HS quota. To view the cutoff ranks for different categories, rounds and quotas, use the provided filtres.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good, faculty is awesome, academics are good too, but placements disappoint me a lot.

review_content.Placements: The placement of our college is not that good. Sure, companies visit here, but the salary is not that good. It's not even the bare minimum. One of my seniors, who was in the last year, got an internship at a Haryana travel agency, which was a semi-government agency. The pay was around Rs.5,000, but the working hours were less, and it was a good opportunity for experience in the work field. However, the placement needs to become a little better here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It's really beautiful and soothing, to be honest, it's so close to nature. We can see the mountains from our college. The college building and campus are full of greenery and are clean 24/7. But, if we talk about hostel food, it does not serve good. Our breakfast and lunch are still bearable, but dinner time is horrible for all the hostelers. There are games and events from time to time. Every year, sports week is conducted by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This college is best for students who want to take admission in architecture. All the best.

review_content.Placements: There are 87 students placed in my course at Indo Global College of Engineering. The highest package of our college goes to 18 LPA but this is off-campus, not on campus. There are so many companies who visit our college for their recruitment like Pisoft and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive and gives us good vibes. All department facilities are okay. Hostel facilities are also good. But mostly students have concerns about mess food. In hostel, we have Wi-Fi connection. We have libraries according to their department.

overview_faqs.question: Is IGGC a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Indo Global Group of Colleges is a good college for BTech, BArch, MBA and M.Tech courses with multiple specialisations available for interested students. These courses have been recognised and accredited by national bodies such as the AICTE, NCTE and CoA. Moreover, IGGC has collaborations with multiple institutions with companies, ensuring that the alumni of Indo Global Group of Colleges are ready when they start their careers.

overview_faqs.question: Is IGGC a recognised college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Indo Global Group of Colleges has been recognised and accredited by various national bodies such as the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education), NCTE (National Council for Teacher Education), and CoA (Council of Architecture). Students of IGGC have a leg up on students from non-accredited institutions as they are ensured to follow national quality standards, equipment and infrastructure.

admission_overview.college_name: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Indo Global Group of Colleges admissions 2026 are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of certain qualifying exams for most of the courses. The college accepts scores in GATE and NATA for MTech and BArch courses. Indo Global Group of Colleges offers more than 15 courses at the UG, PG and diploma levels. The college offers courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Architecture, etc. Candidates can apply for the preferred course online.

eligibility_selection.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The college offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance-exam scores. The college accepts NATA for BArch and GATE score for MTech course. For all other courses, aspirants only need to fulfill the eligibility criteria. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG courses. Below are popular Indo Global Group of Colleges courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with any one of the following: Chemistry/ Biology/ Computer Science/ Biotechnology
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years in any discipline from a recognised university
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics or, 3 year diploma after Class 10 with at least 50% aggregate with Mathematics as a compulsory subject
Class 12 or its equivalent examination in any stream from a recognised board
Class 12 or its equivalent examination in any stream from a recognised board
BE/ BTech with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
courses_table.selection_criteria: GATE/ Merit (in case of insufficient GATE score)

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at Indo Global Group of Colleges. The college has specified minimum aggregate of 50% for a few UG courses. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply provided they also fulfill the subject requirements for the preferred course. Candidates must also meet the selection criteria for admission to applied course.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at Indo Global Group of Colleges with 60% in Class 12?

admission_process.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indo Global Group of Colleges admission processinvolves multiple steps. Candidates wanting to take admission in any of the offered courses can apply online. Below are the steps of the same:-
Candidates can fill out the form on the college website. They have to pay the application fees to submit the form.

Candidates are selected for admission to BArch and MTech based on their NATA and GATE scores. Candidates with insufficient GATE score are selected based on their merit. For all other courses, admission is offered based on merit of Class 12 or Graduation.
Selected candidates need to do the verification of documents and pay theIndo Global Group of Colleges feesto confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: Indo Global Group of Colleges offers the BTech course at the UG level for four years. It is offered in various specialisations such asComputer Science,Electronics & Communication,MechanicalandCivil Engineering.

faqs.question: Does Indo Global Group of Colleges offer lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Indo Global Group of Colleges offer lateral entry to BTech progrmme. In lateral entry, students get direct admission in the second year of the course. Candidates who have passed a minimum of three or two years Diploma examination from an AICTE approved institutions/ recognised university with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in any branch of Engineering and Technology can apply for BTech (LE).

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Indo Global Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Indo Global Group of Colleges offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The college offers AICTE-approved BTech programme in affiliation with Punjab Technical University. Below are the BTech specialisations offered at the college:Computer Science EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringCivil Engineering

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Indo Global Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with any one of the following: Chemistry/ Biology/ Computer Science/ Biotechnology are eligible to apply for BTech at Indo Global Group of Colleges. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

This is because, according to theAICTE, A student can only pursueonePhysical/Full-Timecourse at a time. As per the offcial website, the highest package offered during the recent placements at Indo Global Group of Colleges stood at INR 40 LPA . Earlier, the institute has achieved 92.5% placements in the academic year 2023-24 . A total of 750 students were eligible for 2024 placement drive, of which 694 students received job offers from reputed companies. In 2023, more than 150 companies visited the campus and placed 723 students form the batch of 800 students. Some of the top recruiters of Indo Global Group of Colleges include Cisco, IBM, Wipro, L&T, Redhat, Oracle, Ashoka Leyland, Simplex, etc.

faqs.question: What is the mode of applications at IGGC?
faqs.answer: According to official statements and brochures released by Indo Global Group of Colleges only offers an online mode of applications to any of its programmes. No applications or requests for admission by mail or post will be entertained. Interested candidates must apply online through the official college admissions portal ( igef.net/admissions ).

faqs.question: Is there a placement cell at IGGC?
faqs.answer: Yes , Indo Global Group of Colleges comes equipped with a dedicated Training & Placement Cell . The placement cell at IGGC not only provides regular guidance and comprehensive skill development that prepares them for their future careers. The placement cell at IGGC has shown a comprehensive track record, with over 8,700 students receiving placements in the academic year of 2024.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for BArch at Indo Global Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BArch at Indo Global Group of Colleges is INR 3 lakh . Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay some part of the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. The total fee of IGC includes various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying in IGGC?
faqs.answer: The cost of studying at Indo Global Group of Colleges will depend on various factors, but generally, courses at IGGC have a total tuition fee between INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 5 lakh . Hostel enrollment is another factor, with students having to pay fees of around INR 32,000 per semester. In total, a student at Indo Global Group of Colleges may have to pay between INR 2.48-7.56 Lakhs, not taking into account any miscellaneous fees.

hostel_campus.college_name: Indo Global Group of Colleges Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: A journey that changed my life.
reviews.review_text: IGC had one of the best infrastructure and surroundings, with clean classrooms and hostel, with 24-hour medical facility. Coming from a different state, I always feel paranoid about my living away from home. But IGC was more like home away from home. I never had such difficulty adjusting to its environment.

reviews.review_heading: This college is absolutely very amazing, especially in rainy season and also it's interesting.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college (IGGOC) is very calm and beautiful. It is perfect for study and fresh mind. There is greenery everywhere. Every department has a different building. The environment is very beautiful most of the time. In the rainy season, we can see the real beauty of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, faculty is awesome, academics are good too, but placements disappoint me a lot.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It's really beautiful and soothing, to be honest, it's so close to nature. We can see the mountains from our college. The college building and campus are full of greenery and are clean 24/7. But, if we talk about hostel food, it does not serve good. Our breakfast and lunch are still bearable, but dinner time is horrible for all the hostelers. There are games and events from time to time. Every year, sports week is conducted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is best for students who want to take admission in architecture. All the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive and gives us good vibes. All department facilities are okay. Hostel facilities are also good. But mostly students have concerns about mess food. In hostel, we have Wi-Fi connection. We have libraries according to their department.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Many facilities in our college as well as a hostel like Wi-Fi available 24/7. The food was also good in the hostel mess. The quality of the hostel was very good, with water facilities. Hot water was provided during the winter.

reviews.review_heading: I don't like this college and don't come here.
reviews.review_text: The college and classrooms are adorable, but the study is good. I am from the Northeast and didn't want to stay in the hostel from the start, but we are required to stay in the hostel for 1 year. Even if we don't stay in the hostel, we have to pay the fee. So, staying in the hostel for a year. There are no interesting extracurricular activities. It's in a deep countryside village, and there are no hospital facilities nearby. There's only one canteen with some limited food items.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global College of Engineering as a fresher.
reviews.review_text: There are 45 students in each section, and 2 sections are there in my branch. Two teachers are able to handle the students easily. Teachers are very nice, polite, helpful, and supportive. Guards are a bit harsh, but it is their duty. Overall, the experience is very good with faculty as a fresher.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not a good option.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly in the college. Classrooms are average but very hot in the summer. Do not have many facilities. Very poor transport facility. The college is built in a rural area. It is not very crowded, which is a good point.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of all departments is good. The library has many books related to courses. Labs are available for different courses. We have 3 computer labs. Classrooms are spacious and clean. The food served in the hostel is not much good. The food served in the mess and canteen is below average. Medical facilities are available in our college. Our college provides facilities for sports like basketball, volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements for batch 2023.
reviews.review_text: The college has a fully functioning lab, clean classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library with lots of books available. The quality of food in hostels is average. There is a huge playground as well as a football ground. The hostel rooms are clean, spacious, and well-maintained. The girl's hostels are good too.

reviews.review_heading: Actually college is good by infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Nice building, looks too good but in sports college is not good they don't even do intercollege tournaments. There is no facilities for students to go to even zonal, district level tournaments. They is no scope in sports in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are not so good. The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available and is working properly. Classrooms are good, and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basic, with no projectors and AC classrooms. The traditional methodology of blackboards is followed. There are many computer labs with good facilities available for students. It is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The library has every book you'll ever need. The hostel infrastructure is good, with 24x7 water and electricity, but the quality of food is average. No hostel availability issues at all, as you will get it. Medical facilities and a good canteen are available. There is no s...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Indo Global Group of College is situated nearly 17 km away from PGI Chandigarh in a remote village known as Abhipur. The college is situated in a very prime place. The environment is very peaceful and contribute to a healthy environment for students. The college infrastructure is very good and has a very beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure and greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure and hostel facilities. But Wi-Fi is poor. The mess food is not bad. The canteen offers almost all food items. There are cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball grounds. A clock tower is available. A cafeteria and a gym are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Veda Degree College provides Full Time programs at the UG level. These courses are available in multiple streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. UG programs include B.Sc., B.Com and BBA.

review_content.Placements: In this college, thousands of students altogether, and each student was taken separate care in many placements like Sud Life, My Professional Tax, ICICI Bank careers, and a lot more got better placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was better. It provides a full-time water facility, and the surroundings were always maintained. The canteen was clean, and air-conditioners were available in the classrooms. It also provides a laboratory facility to do projects and PPTs.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were experienced in this college. The pass percentage was very easy if students follow teachers' instructions with a daily schedule. Students need to come regularly to this college to maintain notes and attend exams. Students can easily score good grades if they study properly. Excellent placements were also provided if they follow teachers. This college was affiliated with Osmania University.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides qualified teachers.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 6 LPA, the average salary package was 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Ryan Technologies, Google, and Aquaman Connect. Around 70-80% of students got internships at Deloitte in the financial district. The role offered was a team leader.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities and infrastructure of our college were good. The quality of the food served was good. Wi-Fi facilities and computer labs were good. Mess was very clean.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Rasiklal M Dhariwal Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research:

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Rasiklal M Dhariwal Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research are approved by eminent Government bodies like PCI, AICTE. The combined seats available for courses offered at Rasiklal M Dhariwal Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research goes up to 120.

reviews_list.review_title: It provides the best infrastructure and good placements for students.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students from our course got placed. The salary offered in our course ranges from Rs. 25,000-50,000 per month. About 50% of students from our course got an internship at the college. Roles like a drug inspector, medical representative, teachers, and principal-related jobs, lab assistants, etc., are offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a laboratory, machines, well-developed classrooms and different departments of different sections. The food is not available in the hostel. Students have to buy food from outside. Medical facilities are provided in the hostel. Sports and games are conducted in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college is satisfactory. Placements and facilities are quite good.

review_content.Placements: There were many students in our B.Parmcy course, and almost 100% of the students got placed. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average salary package offered is 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. Around 80% of the students got an internship in top companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are in the OC department, MR, coding, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite satisfactory, and the structure of the building is huge. The total campus is spread over huge space. The building looks a bit old. The mirror windows in some corners are broken, and there is no Wi-Fi. Labs are good with the proper amount of equipment and chemicals needed. Cleanliness is also maintained properly, and bathrooms are also clean. There is no canteen on our college campus. There are 2 big grounds on the campus, but only one ground can be used for sports because another one is fully covered by grass. Facilities available in the hostel are also good. The education provided in our college is also good. Overall, the environment is friendly, but the college building needs some renovation. Classrooms are good and wide, and medical facilities are also proper.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the college. No facilities, no canteen, and no common rooms are available.

review_content.Placements: None of the students get placement from our college. The communication from faculty is worse. No students get internships through the college. The placement rate is 0%. They do not make any effort to help students get placements in industries or companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no cafeteria or any other classroom to have lunch. We sit on the stairs to eat. The washrooms are not clean, and the filter taps are also not clean. No sports are played in the college. Even the kabaddi ground is available to students with their funds.

review_summary.college_name: Rasiklal M Dhariwal Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with literally everything. Not recommended for your graduation.

content.Placements: No placements at all, and if there are any, package is below average. Placement percentage is near 0. Opportunities after this college are very limited.
content.Infrastructure: Building is not clean, and benches are worse. Washrooms are dirtiest and even filthy than public toilets. A cafeteria is not provided, and there is no sign of it being constructed. No place to eat food, students literally eat their lunch on stairs. No ground to play.
content.Faculty: Faculty is okay, some of them are good, but some have no idea what they are teaching. Some teachers make it harder for students to do the work, but some are practical. Curriculum is a bit boring, there are no physical activities included. Exams are good, though.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good and the study environment is very well.

content.Placements: Mostly 10 students from one batch get placement through college. The highest package was about 5 LPA. The roles offered in the jobs through this college and this field are mostly like manager and senior manager. The percentage of internships was 40 percent.
content.Infrastructure: All the labs and classrooms are fine. But no canteen or cafeteria is available. Also, the library is huge and all books related to the course are available. Hostel facilities are also good and near the college for better mobility. Wi-Fi is available in computer labs. The sports room is available and the ground is free for the students to play games and sports.

Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Infosys, etc. Around 80% of the students got an internship in top companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. Top roles offered are in the OC department, MR, coding, etc.

review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified and helpful. Exams are taken very strictly.
review_content.Other: I chose this because of the labs and library. There are events and festivals every last 3 months of a year include music festivals, dance programme, etc. Scholarships are provided every year. Scholarships help you pay the college fees. College is far from the main town, but it is close to a road.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Okay-ish college. Teaching can be improved, otherwise good.

content.Placements: Actually, some continue for M.Sc. and mostly people are unemployed. Some got into government jobs. A few went for higher studies. And some girls got married. But mostly people are unemployed. What would you expect after doing a normal B.Sc. with just passable marks, that too after getting a few back? You need to prepare for other government jobs or get into business.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good. Labs were available. But hostel is not available for our college. Sports and games don't happen much. Classrooms and other things are okay. Quality, I would say, is okay-ish, and for transportation, buses, trains, and other options are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Chemistry - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good option in the city for Science courses .

content.Placements: Good placements for students. After graduation, one can find a job nonstressfully across the city. Good value of certificates. Placements come often. Good career options and opportunities after completing the courses. Great scope of B.Sc. students for further studies also.
content.Infrastructure: Good hostel, great environment, good food, no bad deeds across the area. Learning environment. Sports activities are available. An area for relaxing is there. Good classrooms with smartboards. CCTV cameras are available in classrooms. Good furniture is there. Books are available in libraries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend joining this college. It is the best college in our area.

content.Placements: About 5% of students got placed from our college in other institutes or colleges. The top role offered is a teacher or an assistant professor. The highest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 5,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good and well-maintained. Some classrooms of our college are not good in condition. On rainy days, rooms floor will be filled with rainwater. Other facilities are very good. We play different sports in our college.
