highlights.summary: Jain Deemed-to-be University - Online Campus is an institute. It is located in Kannur, Kerala. The institute is accredited with UGC. Jain Deemed-to-be University - Online Campus provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Part Time mode. It provides 127 courses across specialisations such as Data Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Business Analysis, Business Analytics and Business Intelligence Tools. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc., MCA and BCA. Jain Deemed-to-be University - Online Campus fees ranges between INR 15,000 to 2,80,000. Jain Deemed-to-be University - Online Campus offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Mass Communication & Media, Humanities & Social Sciences and Science. The median salary offered to students is INR 5,15,000. Jain Deemed-to-be University - Online Campus offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 22 LPA. The average salary package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Deloitte, JP Morgan, Infosys, HCL, etc. Around 40% of students got internships from our college in companies like JP Morgan and Deloitte. Top roles offered were secretary, chartered accountant, bank manager, aviation management, and certified management accountant.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided top-notch facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, sports facilities, and a library. The food served in our college was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Com. in International Finance and Accounting (Integrated with ACCA, UK) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the good placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 60% of students get placed. The salary packages offered could be like 3 LPA to 10 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are EY, PWC, KPMG, Deloitte, Accenture, etc. These companies do indulge in recruiting our course too. Around 70% of students are placed with highly reputed companies in the top roles like audit, financial analyst internal accountant, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has an outstanding infrastructure with well-equipped laboratories, libraries, sports centers, and hostels. The hostel is very hygienic and the food served is only vegetarian. There is no choice for non-vegetarians.

MCA

Candidates completed graduation/bachelor's degree of a minimum duration of three years in any stream from a UGC Recognized University with the above mentioned marks or an equivalent letter/numerical grade are eligible to apply. or Candidates who are in the final semester of the bachelor's programme are also eligible to apply.
Certificate
Candidates must have completed bachelor's degree or enrolled in bachelor's degree from any recognised institute/university are eligible to apply.

review_summary.college_name: Jain Deemed-to-be University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA in International Finance (Accredited by ACCA, UK) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Jain University is one of the best universities in Bangalore.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered in our course is 2.5 LPA. Big 4 accounting firms visit here. I just joined this course, so I don't know much about internships. This is the best college among other colleges, so internships and placements are easily available.
content.Infrastructure: As I am studying online. Overall, the facilities and infrastructure are great. They provide air-conditioned classrooms. There are excellent libraries.
content.Faculty: The pass percentage is 35% because attendance is not compulsory. This course is most relevant. I didn't find it at any other college other than Jain. It is very useful and worth the money you spend here. The online facility is the best.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Data Science and Analytics (Online) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the place where students can discuss all kinds of business ideas.

content.Placements: More than 65% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3.8 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges from 4 LPA - 4.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Reliance, and Accenture. Almost 60% of students got placed in companies like Accenture, Mynta, etc. The top roles offered are operation manager and business manager.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. The course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for business. Semester exams are very difficult, and the pass percentage is 80%. They also provide all kinds of materials for assignments. We have open-minded elders in this college. We never have to buy books because teachers give us much time to complete our studies. They also provide solutions to every problem. They are very confident in students and their behavior is very calm.

individual_reviews.course: - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 22 LPA. The average salary package offered was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 9 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Deloitte, JP Morgan, Infosys, HCL, etc. Around 40% of students got internships from our college in companies like JP Morgan and Deloitte. Top roles offered were secretary, chartered accountant, bank manager, aviation management, and certified management accountant.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided top-notch facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, sports facilities, and a library. The food served in our college was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in International Finance and Accounting (Integrated with ACCA, UK) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the good placements.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students get placed. The salary packages offered could be like 3 LPA to 10 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are EY, PWC, KPMG, Deloitte, Accenture, etc. These companies do indulge in recruiting our course too. Around 70% of students are placed with highly reputed companies in the top roles like audit, financial analyst internal accountant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an outstanding infrastructure with well-equipped laboratories, libraries, sports centers, and hostels. The hostel is very hygienic and the food served is only vegetarian. There is no choice for non-vegetarians.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Banking and Finance - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and I am absolutely satisfied because of good placements.

content.Placements: The percentage of passed out students is 90% and above, and they are placed in good companies. The highest salary package offered is 22 Lacs per annum. The top recruiting companies are Google, Flipkart, Dell etc. Various roles are offered in my course. Above 85% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-maintained and are good. Wi-Fi on the campus has good speed. The labs are maintained well, and all the equipment is available. The library is very peaceful, and the books are maintained correctly. All the books are available.
